rationale.root_cause: The model produced no analysis and did not identify the use-after-free where data is freed and then used (printLine) around the bad site. It did not explain the concrete mechanism.
rationale.local_fix: No change such as moving printLine before free or postponing free was suggested. Therefore, it provided no proximate fix.
rationale.global_fix: There was no proposal to enforce lifetime via ownership conventions or RAII-style wrappers. Hence, it failed to offer a global fix.
